description: Configure a 'Critical_Log_Gap_Alert' profile in ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer to monitor the local host ('127.0.0.1', 'localhost', or 'ubuntu-server'). The alert must trigger when no logs are received for 15 minutes and send an email to 'soc_team@example.com' with the subject 'Log Source Failure'. Ensure the alert is enabled to notify the team if the local server stops sending logs.
